title: Conis Warns the Crew
description: The White Berets and God’s forces treat the Straw Hats as criminals, forcing the crew to choose escape over obedience.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Conis, McKinley, Luffy, Nami, Usopp. The White Berets and God’s forces treat the Straw Hats as criminals, forcing the crew to choose escape over obedience.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Uh, what are you talking about!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Why were they crawling on the ground?

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: To get on board quickly in

dialogue.speaker: Sky Island soldier
dialogue.text: According to Heaven's judgement, illegal transpassing in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You will immediately become regular tourists.

summary: The White Berets and God’s forces treat the Straw Hats as criminals, forcing the crew to choose escape over obedience.
